original: Apollo 13 announces, "Okay, Houston, we've had a problem here" after a Beech-built oxygen tank exploded en route to the Moon

The Beatles record their single "Help!"
Jackson slugs a 3-run HR in the 1st inning, & the field is showered
Longest doubles ping-pong match ends after 101 hours
Longest 2 undefeated baseball teams to meet (NY Yanks 5-0 vs Toronto Blue Jays 6-0); Yanks score 3 in top of 9th to win 5-2
World's largest plane by wingspan at 117m (385 ft), the Stratolaunch, built as a flying launch pad for satellites, takes its first flight from Mojave, California
Tropical Cyclone Ilsa makes landfall in remote western Australia, between De Grey and Pardoo Roadhouse, as a category five storm, setting a new sustained wind speed record of 218 kph (135 mph)

The MacLean brothers, Ewan (32), Jamie (31), and Lachlan (27) of Scotland depart in a rowboat from Lima, Peru to cross the Pacifiic Ocean, headed for Australia; they hope to raise funds for clean water access in Madagascar through donations
Asteroid 7373 Takei discovered and named after Star Trek actorGeorge Takei

Marthe Cohn, French nurse and spy during World War Ⅱ, born in Metz, France (d. 2025)[1]

HMS Beagle anchors at river mouth of Rio Santa Cruz, Patagonia
